infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow camera access to preview signs for the sign recognition prototype.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow microphone access to log spoken partner replies in the conversation.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Allow speech recognition to transcribe spoken partner replies.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow camera access to preview signs for the sign recognition prototype.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow microphone access to log spoken partner replies in the conversation.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow speech recognition to transcribe spoken partner replies.
